expectedResult: Selected library part is added to the BOM with repository-backed save status.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by tests/CoreProductionFlows.test.tsx.
notes: BOM item uses Part Library master data.

expectedResult: Local item saves and remains explicit as local/custom data.
actualResult: Pass. Existing role test covers local add; repository test covers local item marker.
notes: Promotion to Part Library remains a later enhancement, not a blocker for local item creation.

expectedResult: BOM totals recalculate and durable repository sync receives updated tree.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by bomStore and FormulaEngine regression tests.

preconditions: A non-root BOM node is selected.
expectedResult: Node is removed with confirmation and repository audit receives a BOM event.
actualResult: Pass. UI confirmation implemented; repository audit is covered by core repository tests.

expectedResult: Preview and validation appear before commit; invalid rows block commit.
actualResult: Pass. CSV Import Preview and commit are covered by tests/CoreProductionFlows.test.tsx.

expectedResult: CSV file is generated.
actualResult: Pass. Existing export generates a real CSV blob from current BOM tree.

expectedResult: Snapshot persists and can replace the active BOM tree after confirmation.
actualResult: Pass. Repository-backed creation and reload are covered by tests/bomStore.test.ts.

expectedResult: Mutation controls are disabled or hidden and protected costs do not leak.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by role use-case tests.

expectedResult: Procurement review fields are visible without engineering-only structure mutation.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by role use-case and BOM flat procurement behavior.

expectedResult: Core BOM surface remains reachable in narrow viewport.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by npm run test:core-browser narrow BOM screenshot.

expectedResult: New part is added through durable repository-compatible store flow.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by RoleUseCases and CoreProductionFlows duplicate validation.

preconditions: Sourcing role active and part edit panel open.
expectedResult: Commercial fields save and remain role-gated.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by RoleUseCases and Part Library UI.

preconditions: Engineer role active and part edit panel open.
expectedResult: Engineering metadata can be updated when permitted.
actualResult: Pass. Metadata fields are permission-gated through UI and core policy.

expectedResult: Duplicate part number is blocked with a clear message.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by tests/CoreProductionFlows.test.tsx and repository conflict test.

expectedResult: Results update deterministically.
actualResult: Pass. Supplier search, lifecycle/stock filters, and sort selector are implemented; supplier sort covered by CoreProductionFlows.

expectedResult: BOM usage is visible.
actualResult: Pass. Where Used panel resolves active BOM usage.

preconditions: Concrete part is mapped to a design master.
expectedResult: Related tooling records are shown.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by tests/CoreProductionFlows.test.tsx.

expectedResult: Part is deactivated/archive-marked instead of hard-deleted.
actualResult: Pass. Archive UI sets Obsolete/zero stock and repository exposes archivePart.

expectedResult: Protected commercial data is masked.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by RoleUseCases.

expectedResult: Part audit events are visible.
actualResult: Pass. Audit tab reads durable core repository audit events.

expectedResult: Design master appears with concrete mapping.
actualResult: Pass. UI and repository-backed store flow are implemented.

expectedResult: Concrete part mapping is persisted.
actualResult: Pass. Concrete selector is backed by Part Library and repository mapping tests cover relationship integrity.

expectedResult: Tooling record appears under selected design master.
actualResult: Pass. UI and store flow are implemented.

expectedResult: Tooling record fields persist and show save feedback.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by tests/CoreProductionFlows.test.tsx.

expectedResult: Milestone update persists and status feedback appears.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by tests/CoreProductionFlows.test.tsx and toolingStore tests.

expectedResult: Blocked status and blocker reason persist.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by tests/CoreProductionFlows.test.tsx.

expectedResult: Kickoff-to-T1 lead time is visible and mutation controls are hidden for Viewer.
actualResult: Pass. Lead time covered by workflow and store tests; permissions are role-gated.

preconditions: Design master has concrete part mappings.
expectedResult: App navigates to Part Library filtered to the concrete part and shows BOM usage/tooling relationship context.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by tests/AppNavigation.test.tsx.

expectedResult: Viewer can inspect tooling status read-only.
actualResult: Pass. Role-gated controls remain hidden when manage tooling permission is absent.

expectedResult: Tooling status remains reachable in narrow viewport.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by npm run test:core-browser narrow Tooling Hub screenshot.

steps: Navigate to Dashboard or Product Matrix
expectedResult: Development Preview banner is shown.
actualResult: Pass. Covered by tests/AppNavigation.test.tsx and browser QA screenshots.
